zh.lifeSummary: 當John Richards於1465年出生在英國多瑟特多爾斯特時，他的父親Sir John William Richards20歲，母親Margery de Eyton19歲。他於1483年與Agnes Wells在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年在英國薩默塞特梅利特享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特梅利特哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Richards于1465年出生在英国多瑟特多爾斯特时，他的父亲Sir John William Richards20岁，母亲Margery de Eyton19岁。他于1483年与Agnes Wells在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年在英国薩默塞特梅利特享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特梅利特哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Richards
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Rickards .
German: patronymic from the personal name   Richard  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Richards was born in 1465, in Dorchester, Dorset, England, his father, Sir John William Richards, was 20 and his mother, Margery de Eyton, was 19. He married Agnes Wells in 1483, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1549, in Merriott, Somerset, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Merriott, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Agnes Wells en 1483, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1549, à Merriott, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints' Church, Merriott, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Church of All Saints, Merriott, South So: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 머리엇 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Richards(이)가 1465년 영국 도르세트 도르체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John William Richards(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Eyton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1483년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Agnes Wells(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 영국 서머세트 머리엇에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 머리엇 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Richards nasceu em 1465, em Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John William Richards, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Eyton, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Wells em 1483, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1549, em Merriott, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints' Church, Merriott, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Church of All Saints, Merriott, South So: алл сеинц' чурч, мирриотт, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Richards родился в 1465 г. в местности дорчестир, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John William Richards было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Eyton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Wells в 1483 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1549 г. в местности мирриотт, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц' чурч, мирриотт, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
